name: CUSTOM_PERSONALITY
description: The custom instructions set by user in the Customize tab in settings.

name: FULL_NAME
description: The full name of the user that is set in the Account settings.

name: X_HANDLE
description: The X (Twitter) handle of the user.

name: FULL_DATE_AND_TIME
format: EEEE, MMMM d, yyyy hh:mm a z

name: PROJECT_INSTRUCTIONS
description: The project instructions set by user in the Project settings.
